Reduce Lobster Stock by 50% (33 qts should remain)
Once reduced, add onion, tomato paste, and toasted garlic.
If reheating stock after previously reducing and cooling, allow to come to simmer with onion, tomato paste, and garlic first
Using a large immersion blender, blend the ingredients in to cook more thoroughly
With reduce stock simmering and added ingredients, add cream and reduce by half again, still at a constant simmer
Turn heat off, cut butter into tabs and mount the butter while stiring
Season with Shiro Dashi to taste, between 500 and 750 mL depending on intensity of the starting stock
Using a large immersion blender, blend smooth and ensure no large particles left
Reserve to 22 quart cambros, or appropriate containers, and cool in blast chiller or ice bath until cool.  Store in cooler.
***NOTE: Candian lobsters will be less salty/intense, and Maine Lobsters will be more salty/intense
